content.text:
产品ASIN码：B0DGQ7L856 标题：Handheld Pressurized Steam Cleaner with 12 pcs Accessories, Steamer for Cleaning, Steam Cleaner for Home Use, Steamer for Cleaning Car, Furniture, Floor, Upholstery, Grout and Tile, Deep Gray 主图：https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41OKIq0-KJL.jpg 价格：43.99 星级：4.10 评论数：1003 品牌：CURMEDI 所属nodeid：3303862011 卖家名称：YUTING US 卖家来源：CN 分类：STEAM CLEANER 属性：{"Brand":"CURMEDI","Special Feature":"High Pressure Steam Cleaner for Cleaning, Multi-Surface Steamer, 12 Piece Accessories, Long Power Cord, Continuous Steam, Safe for Kids and Pets, Fast HeatingHigh Pressure Steam Cleaner for Cleaning, Multi-Surface Steamer, 12 Piece Accessories, Long Power Cord, Continuous Steam, Safe for Kids and Pets, Fast Heating See more","Surface Recommendation":"Cleaning Car, Machine, Fabric, Sink, Gap, Wall, Upholstery, Floor, Detailing, Tile, Grout, Carpet, Furniture, Bathroom, Tools, Kitchen, Window, Bed,House, Mattress and moreCleaning Car, Machine, Fabric, Sink, Gap, Wall, Upholstery, Floor, Detailing, Tile, Grout, Carpet, Furniture, Bathroom, Tools, Kitchen, Window, Bed,House, Mattress and more See more","Model Name":"Steam Cleaner, Gray","Included Components":"Funnel, Measuring Cup, Round Brush(x4), Bent Spray Nozzle, Long Spray Nozzle, Extended Connecting Spray Nozzle, General Spray Nozzle, Window Squeegee, Tower SleeveFunnel, Measuring Cup, Round Brush(x4), Bent Spray Nozzle, Long Spray Nozzle, Extended Connecting Spray Nozzle, General Spray Nozzle, Window Squeegee, Tower… See more"}；Color=Deep Gray 上线日期：2024-10-10 已上线天数：526 子体数：1所属类目销量排名：类目：Handheld Steamers，排名:7 月销量：月销量：13431 月销额：月销额：590829.69 产品描述：Powerful Steam Cleaner: With 1050 watts of steam power, can heat up in 3-5 minutes fast to emit 239 ℉(115 ℃) of pressurized powerful hot steam, it is great for cleaning all kinds of grease, dust and stains
Multifunctional Steam Cleaner: Our handheld steam cleaner is a versatile and fully equipped cleaning tool, you can use this steamer to clean floor, tile, grout, fabric and sofa material, windows, car, furniture, upholstery, sink, gap, wall, kitchen, bath and more
12 Pieces Accessory Set: It contains 12 exclusive accessories including 5 nozzles, 4 brushes and other attachments, you can choose different accessories to match up to clean hard-to-reach areas, better meet your multiple cleaning needs
Safe Steamer: With pure high-pressure water steam used, all nature and completely safe. Our steamer is designed to prevent heating empty boiler, the machine will automatically disconnect the power supply after the tank water is evaporated completely. It is also equipped with a safety cap to prevent accidental contact by children. Pretty safe to use in home with kids and pets
Compact and Portable Steamer: Our handheld steamer is compact and portable, not make you feel heavy to use. It is equipped with a 9.4ft(2.86m) long power cord, offers the flexibility to use it both indoors and outdoors. The large water tank of 350 ml(recommended load capacity is within 250 ml) allows you to concentrate on cleaning without having to refill and change water frequently
Warm Tips1：Please ensure the cap is fully tightened when using, otherwise the steam will leak out. The amount of water in the tank is recommended to be no more than 250 ml, if too much water is added the machine may spray some water when used
Warm Tips2：This steamer with safety design, you need to press the steam button to release the internal pressure after use. Please open the safety cover after the power is off and the steam has cooled down to avoid burns, if you can‘t open it, please try again in a few minutes
特征：{} 外包装尺寸：27.41*25.30*16.21 依据这些数据进行总结，如无明确指令不要延伸调用其他工具。可以给用户提示延伸数据获取的建议。
